name: Swallowed Penny
description: Drop a coin when you take damage. Essential for Keeper.

name: Petrified Poop
description: Greatly increased chance of drops from destroying poop.

name: AAA Battery
description: Active items need one less charge to activate.

name: Broken Remote
description: Using an active item teleports you to a random room.

name: Purple Heart
description: Increased champion enemy spawn rate. More challenge, more drops.

name: Cartridge
description: Chance for My Little Unicorn invincibility on damage.

name: Pulse Worm
description: Tears pulsate in size as they travel.

name: Wiggle Worm
description: Tears travel in a wave pattern. +0.4 tears.

name: Ring Worm
description: Tears travel in a spiral pattern. Hard to aim but can hit more.

name: Flat Worm
description: Tears are wider/flatter. Slightly larger hitbox.

name: Store Credit
description: One free shop item. Consumed on use.

name: Callus
description: Immune to spike and creep damage.

name: Lucky Rock
description: Destroying rocks always drops a coin.

name: Mom's Toenail
description: Mom's foot stomps a random enemy every 60 seconds.

name: Black Lipstick
description: Chance for black hearts instead of red hearts.

name: Bible Tract
description: Chance for eternal hearts instead of red hearts.

name: Paper Clip
description: All golden chests are free to open (no key required).

name: Monkey Paw
description: At half a heart, drops a black heart (up to 3 times).

name: Mysterious Paper
description: Randomly grants Missing Poster, Polaroid, Negative, or A Noose effect.

name: Daemon's Tail
description: Most heart drops become black hearts, but hearts are rarer overall.

name: Missing Poster
description: Die in a Sacrifice Room to unlock The Lost. After unlocking, revives as The Lost on death.

name: Butt Penny
description: Picking up coins makes you fart, pushing away enemies.

name: Mysterious Candy
description: Randomly spawns poop or farts.

name: Hook Worm
description: Tears travel in angular N-shaped patterns.

name: Whip Worm
description: Shot speed way up (+0.5).

name: Broken Magnet
description: Pulls coins toward you from a short range.

name: Rosary Bead
description: Higher Angel Room chance. The Bible appears more in shops.

name: Crystal Ball
description: Chance for soul heart or card drop from clearing rooms.

name: Goat Hoof
description: Speed +0.15.

name: Curved Horn
description: Damage +2.

name: Rusted Key
description: Higher chance of keys dropping and locked chests spawning.

name: Match Stick
description: Chance for bombs to drop. Removes the Tick if held.

name: The Tick
description: Bosses start with 15% less health. Cannot be removed normally.

name: Cracked Dice
description: On damage, random D4/D6/D8/D10/D12/D20 effect.

name: Super Magnet
description: Pulls all enemies toward you. Dangerous but controllable.

name: Faded Polaroid
description: Randomly causes you to blend in, confusing enemies.

name: Louse
description: Spawns a blue spider every 60 seconds.

name: Bob's Bladder
description: Bombs leave a green creep pool.

name: Watch Battery
description: Chance for an extra charge on active item per room.

name: Blasting Cap
description: Chance for bombs to drop a pickup on explosion.

name: Stud Finder
description: Crawl spaces appear more frequently.

name: Error
description: Random trinket effect each room.

name: Poker Chip
description: Chests have 50% chance of double reward, 50% chance of nothing.

name: Blister
description: Increased knockback on your tears.

name: Second Hand
description: Status effects (poison, slow, etc.) last twice as long.

name: Endless Nameless
description: Using a card/pill/rune has a chance to spawn a copy.

name: Black Feather
description: Damage +0.5 for each 'evil' item you hold (Brimstone, Pentagram, etc.).

name: Blind Rage
description: Longer invincibility frames after taking damage.

name: Golden Horse Shoe
description: Treasure rooms have a chance to spawn two items.

name: Perfection
description: Luck +10. Drops when you complete a floor without taking damage. Destroyed on hit.

name: Cracked Key
description: One-time use: creates a red room. Used to unlock tainted characters in Home.

name: Sigil of Baphomet
description: Brief invincibility after killing an enemy.

name: Telescope Lens
description: Planetarium chance increased. Boss room may drop planetarium items.

name: Mom's Lock
description: Chance for extra drops from chests and machines.

name: Dice Bag
description: Chance to get a free dice active item each room.

name: Holy Crown
description: Treasure room and shop appear in Cathedral/Chest.

name: Wicked Crown
description: Treasure room and shop appear in Sheol/Dark Room.

name: Azazel's Stump
description: Chance to become Azazel (flight + mini Brimstone) for each room.

name: Dingle Berry
description: Friendly dip spawns when clearing rooms.

name: Ring Cap
description: Bombs spawn 2 extra bombs on detonation.

name: Gilded Key
description: Better chest rewards. Golden chest from starting room each floor.

name: Lucky Sack
description: Sack drops after beating each boss.

name: Worm Friend
description: Worm bursts from ground to grab enemies.

name: Bone Spurs
description: Bone orbitals from enemy kills.

name: Polished Bone
description: Chance for bone orbital from clearing rooms.

name: Hollow Heart
description: Extra bone heart each floor.

name: Kid's Drawing
description: Counts as 1 item toward Guppy transformation.

name: Crystal Key
description: Chance for red rooms when clearing rooms.

name: Keeper's Bargain
description: 50% off all Devil Deal prices.

name: Cursed Penny
description: Teleport to a random room when picking up a coin.

name: Your Soul
description: Free devil deal item. Consumed on use.

name: Number Magnet
description: Higher Devil Room chance. Krampus won't appear.

name: Broken Syringe
description: Random syringe item effect each room. Counts toward Spun transformation.

name: Short Fuse
description: Bombs explode faster.

name: Gigante Bean
description: Massive knockback fart.

name: A Lighter
description: Fires start in rooms when entering.

name: Broken Padlock
description: Bombs can open locked doors and chests.

name: Myosotis
description: Uncollected pickups from the previous floor appear in starting room.

name: 'M
description: Using an active item rerolls it into another active item.

name: Panic Button
description: Active item triggers automatically when you take damage.

name: RC Remote
description: Control familiar movement directly with the fire buttons.

name: Found Soul
description: Ghost familiar that copies your actions. Dies in one hit, respawns next floor.

name: Expansion Pack
description: Using active item also triggers 2 random active effects.

name: Beth's Essence
description: Wisps spawn when entering Angel Rooms or using angel items.

name: Old Capacitor
description: Active items don't charge from clearing rooms, but batteries drop more often.

name: Brain Worm
description: Tears turn 90 degrees to track enemies they pass near.

name: Forgotten Lullaby
description: Familiars fire 25% faster.

name: Beth's Faith
description: Spawn wisps at the start of each floor.

name: Charged Penny
description: Picking up coins has a chance to add a charge to your active item.

name: Temporary Tattoo
description: Clearing a boss challenge room drops a chest.
